name: Planet X Mini Glow Golf
about: Planet X Mini Glow Golf is a recreational facility featuring a miniature golf course designed as a scaled-down version of traditional golf. The course is constructed on a small, artificial layout with various obstacles and challenges such as tunnels, windmills, ramps, and waterfalls. It is designed to be imaginative and whimsical, with each hole serving as a mini-adventure featuring colorful, themed obstacles. The venue is accessible to people of all ages and skill levels, providing an opportunity for interaction, camaraderie, and friendly competition among players. The facility operates with varying hours throughout the week and is located in Square One Mall in Saugus, MA.
why_golfers_like_it: Themed obstacles and creative challenges add excitement to every putt
Accessible to all ages and skill levels
Perfect for group activities and friendly competition

faq.answer: Putters and balls are provided by the venue.

faq.answer: No information on external food or drink policies.

faq.answer: No specific time information provided for completing the course.

faq.answer: Yes, the venue is accessible to people of all ages and skill levels, making it perfect for children.
